channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - AI & Machine Learning
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: AI & Machine Learning

item.title: Multi-omics-based machine learning model predicts response and guides treatment in Crohn's disease: a case study in nutritional therapy-response to editorial.
Dynamic changes in serum gelsolin combined with clinical parameters to construct a predictive model for mucosal healing in inflammatory bowel disease: A prospective cohort study.
item.description: Medicine - Observational study - Mucosal healing represents a critical therapeutic endpoint in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), yet reliable noninvasive predictive biomarkers remain limited. Serum gelsolin (GSN) has emerged as a ...
